apiKey.description: Supermemory API key. Optional — auto-resolves from SUPERMEMORY_API_KEY env var or GCloud Secret Manager.

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject user profile and relevant memories into agent context before each run.

autoCapture.description: Automatically store conversation transcripts after each agent run for memory extraction.

filterPrompt.description: Custom prompt to guide what gets extracted from conversations.

containerTagPrefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to container tags for namespace isolation.

entityContext.description: Per-user context string to guide memory extraction quality (max 1500 chars).

gcpProject.description: GCP project for Secret Manager API key resolution.

gcpSecretName.description: GCP secret name for API key resolution.
